Roles within the space

As a participant you are aware and agree to the rules described in the Nieuwland Guidelines that apply to their space. You are also aware of the identity’s PlayHouse facilitates to. If you are not, you should read the About page and our definition of WLINTA.

Identities and roles that do not fit within the Radical Queer Playhouse and/or Nieuwland guidelines will be asked to not enter/leave the space.

A Facilitator

Is anyone who is facilitating for Playhouse/the participants. All participants can offer their support to the facilitators by helping set-up and clean-up the spaces.

Care bears

These are participants who choose to support emotionally within their own capacity.

    You can approach the Care bears if you:
  • need someone to help you navigate the space.
  • have any questions about navigating the space before or during PlayHouse.
  • feel this is a role you could support in;
  • have other questions related to Care bears.
Send a message to the Big Fat Pervs or ask for a Care bear during PlayHouse.

Big Fat Pervs

Big Fat pervs is available for PlayHouse related questions before, during and after Playhouse.

Hosts

There are two types of hosts that can be present during Playhouse

Greetings-host

Greats people at the door if they have not met you yet. This is often the Big Fat Pervs facilitator who facilitates online communication as well. If there is someone in the space that is making you feel unsafe, the Greetings-Host can support you in this as well as the Care bears and other Big Fat Pervs.

Nieuwland-host

Can answer any questions about the building and Nieuwland. If there is anything dangerous, broken or damaged within the space, please let the Nieuwland-host know as soon as possible.

If you would like to collaborate or contribute, please contact us by e-mail bigfatpervs@riseup.net
